name: Alpha Vantage
description_short: Free and premium financial data API with real-time/historical stock data, 50+ technical indicators, and AI/LLM integration.
description_long:
Alpha Vantage is one of the most popular financial data APIs for developers, quants, and traders who need programmatic access to market data. The API provides real-time and historical data for stocks, forex, crypto, commodities, and economic indicators, along with 50+ pre-computed technical indicators.

The free tier offers 25 API requests per day, which is sufficient for basic research and prototyping. Premium tiers scale up to 1,200 requests per minute at $249.99/month, suitable for production applications and high-frequency data needs.

Alpha Vantage has positioned itself as the go-to data provider for AI and machine learning applications, with official integrations for major LLM platforms. The API supports JSON and CSV formats, making it easy to integrate with Python, JavaScript, and other programming languages commonly used in quantitative finance.
pros: Simple REST API easy to integrate
cons: Free tier very limited at 25 requests/day
Data quality issues reported by some users
